objective: Complete PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY final audit by mapping every completion definition item to executable evidence, adding an audit script and report, and verifying the full evaluator

evaluator.command: bun run audit:plan && bun run eval:context && bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when the final audit script proves every PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY completion definition item has executable evidence, emits a stable report, and audit/eval/check/test/build all pass

lastValidation.evidence: bun run audit:plan && bun run eval:context && bun run check && bun run test && bun run build passed; audit status=pass for every PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY completion item; metrics ownerHitRate=1 flowPathCompleteness=1 staleHitRate=0 deletedHitRate=0 resolvedEdgeRate=0.4 unresolvedEdgeCount=3 graphRerankLift=5 largeFullBodyViolations=0; vitest 14 files 41 tests passed
